use_cases: Animated hero section typography with geometric letter rendering
Brand presentation text effects with spring-based motion
Landing page headings with staggered path animations
Decorative animated text for tech-themed designs
Vietnamese text display with Samsung Bold Tech styling
ai_summary: SVG-based animated text effect component that renders geometric letter shapes using stroke-based path animations. Features spring physics with opacity, scale, and 3D rotation transforms for a bold tech aesthetic. Uses motion/react for smooth entrance animations with staggered timing across path elements.
